2605.20177.title: From Seeing to Thinking: Decoupling Perception and Reasoning Improves Post-Training of Vision-Language Models
2605.20177.paper_summary: Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) emphasize long chain-of-thought reasoning; yet, we find that their performance on visual tasks is primarily limited by a lack of visual perception as opposed to reasoning itself. In this work, we systematically study the interplay between perception and reasoning in VLM post-training by decomposing their capabilities into three separate training stages: visual perception, visual reasoning, and textual reasoning, incorporating specialized training data. We demonstrate that visual perception (a) requires targeted optimization with specialized data; (b) serves as a fundamental scaffold that should be solidified through staged training before refining visual reasoning; and (c) is more effectively learned via RL than caption-based SFT. Our experiments across multiple VLMs demonstrate that staged training consistently improves both visual perception and reasoning performance over merged training. Notably, models trained with our approach achieve 1.5% higher reasoning accuracy with 20.8% shorter reasoning traces, suggesting that superior perception reduces the need for excessive reasoning. Furthermore, we show that this capability-based staging represents a new curriculum dimension orthogonal to traditional difficulty-based curricula, and combining both yields further additive gains. Our staged-training models achieve superior performance among open-weight VLMs, establishing advanced results on several visual math and perception (e.g., +5.2% on WeMath and +3.7% on RealWorldQA) tasks compared with the base counterpart.
2605.20177.paper_summary_zh: 最近在視覺-語言模型（VLMs）方面的進展強調了長鏈思考推理；然而，我們發現它們在視覺任務上的表現主要受到視覺感知不足的限制，而非推理本身。在這項工作中，我們系統性地研究了VLM後訓練中感知與推理之間的相互作用，通過將其能力分解為三個獨立的訓練階段：視覺感知、視覺推理和文本推理，並納入專門的訓練數據。我們證明了視覺感知（a）需要針對性優化與專門數據；（b）作為一個基本的支架，應通過分階段訓練來鞏固，然後再精煉視覺推理；以及（c）通過強化學習（RL）比基於標題的SFT更有效地學習。我們在多個VLM上的實驗表明，分階段訓練始終能改善視覺感知和推理性能，相較於合併訓練。值得注意的是，採用我們的方法訓練的模型在推理準確率上提高了1.5%，推理痕跡縮短了20.8%，這表明更優的感知減少了過度推理的需求。此外，我們顯示這種基於能力的分階段代表了一個新的課程維度，與傳統的基於難度的課程正交，並且將兩者結合會帶來進一步的增益。我們的分階段訓練模型在開放權重的VLM中表現出色，與基準模型相比，在幾個視覺數學和感知（例如，WeMath上提高5.2%和RealWorldQA上提高3.7%）任務上建立了先進的結果。
2605.20177.author: Juncheng Wu et.al.
2605.20177.authors: Juncheng Wu, Hardy Chen, Haoqin Tu, Xianfeng Tang, Freda Shi, Hui Liu, Hanqing Lu, Cihang Xie, Yuyin Zhou
